# surgical-dev Standards Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please verify it meets the surgical-dev Standards:

- [ ] **Surgical Scope:** Does this change *only* touch what is required? (No quote changes, no style drift, no unrelated refactors).
- [ ] **Reproduction First:** If this is a bug fix, have you included a test or reproduction step that fails before your change?
- [ ] **Senior Pragmatism (KISS):** Is this the simplest possible solution? (No speculative abstractions or "just-in-case" config).
- [ ] **Cleanliness:** Does this remove any orphans (imports/vars) created by your changes?

## Summary
<!-- Describe WHAT you changed and WHY it is surgical. -->

## Verification
<!-- Provide evidence that this change works as intended. -->
